context: EIP-7702 set-code delegation evidence for QUORUM Treasurer wallet on Base mainnet. Confirms the wallet has an active set-code delegate (Pectra/EIP-7702), which is the basis for the README:28 claim that the wallet is an EIP-7702 smart EOA. Anyone can independently re-run the curl below.

interpretation.prefix_meaning: EIP-7702 set-code marker (per Pectra spec). Any code starting with 0xef0100 indicates the EOA has an active set-code delegation.
interpretation.delegate_meaning: 20-byte address following the 0xef0100 marker is the contract whose code the EOA executes when called. This is the implementation contract behind the smart EOA.
